purpose: Structured invariants for AI agents maintaining ExcelAlchemy.

agent_operating_invariants.statement: Agents act only under an explicit task.
Agents must read real repository context before editing.
agent_operating_invariants.enforcement: Do not imagine code structure; inspect files and search usages first.

agent_operating_invariants.statement: Changes must be minimal and scoped to the task.
agent_operating_invariants.enforcement: Do not modify unrelated files or reformat unrelated areas.

agent_operating_invariants.statement: Behavior changes must be testable and validated.
agent_operating_invariants.enforcement: Report failed or unrun validation explicitly.

agent_operating_invariants.statement: The workflow harness is deterministic even when the agent is non-deterministic.
agent_operating_invariants.enforcement: Follow understand, plan, execute, validate, review, fix, and report.

agent_operating_invariants.statement: Validation failures must be analyzed before retrying.
agent_operating_invariants.enforcement: Update the hypothesis and plan before applying a fix.

architecture_invariants.statement: Stable public imports come from the package root and public modules.
Internal modules must not be presented as stable application-facing API.
Compatibility imports and deprecation warnings remain available in the 2.x line.
Storage is modeled as ExcelStorage, not as a Minio-only architecture.

domain_invariants.statement: Field behavior belongs in codecs, including parsing, formatting, normalization, and header comments.
Composite codecs preserve stable flattened labels, keys, offsets, and reconstruction behavior.
Workbook transformations must remain explainable and round-trippable for supported types.
Runtime workbook tables use WorksheetTable rather than pandas-first internals.
Each import run reloads workbook state and tracks a fresh session snapshot.
Cell-level and row-level validation issues remain distinct.

result_and_payload_invariants.statement: ImportResult, CellErrorMap, and RowIssueMap are stable public result surfaces.
ImportResult has exactly three top-level states: SUCCESS, HEADER_INVALID, and DATA_INVALID.
Header-invalid imports end without uploading a result workbook.
Data-invalid imports upload a result workbook and report a download URL.

locale_and_message_invariants.statement: Workbook-facing display locale supports zh-CN and en.
Runtime exceptions and diagnostics are English-first in the 2.x line.
Do not change message wording casually when tests or docs treat it as contract.

safety_boundaries: Do not delete or replace src/excelalchemy core modules without explicit instruction.
Do not remove public exports from src/excelalchemy/__init__.py casually.
Do not remove compatibility modules or deprecation warnings casually.
Do not replace WorksheetTable with pandas-first internals.
Do not reframe storage as Minio-only.
Do not change generated output snapshots without regeneration and validation.
Do not commit secrets, credentials, tokens, or private endpoint details.
Do not add uncontrolled network, filesystem, time, randomness, or global-state behavior to core logic.
